current_suggestion.pitch: Your carnivore/low-carb channels (Saladino, Chaffee, Berry) are generally advocates — Diet Doctor, led by Dr. Andreas Eenfeldt and a rotating cast of clinicians, operates more as a structured editorial voice that applies rigorous skepticism to both conventional dietary guidelines AND low-carb claims, giving you the steelman of evidence-based critique from within the low-carb space rather than from outside it. They regularly feature researchers and clinicians who engage directly with RCT data, clinical outcomes, and metabolic science in a way that complements but meaningfully challenges the more tribal framing you get from your current lineup. Format is a mix of short explainers, clinician interviews, and deep-dives — consistently substantive without being sensationalized.
